results.abstract: Methods and devices to detect analyte in body fluid are provided. results.title: Use of laser light and red-green-blue coloration to determine properties of back scattered light
results.abstract: A surgical image acquisition system includes multiple illumination sources, each source emitting light at a specified wavelength, a light sensor to receive light reflected from a tissue sample illuminated by each of the illumination sources, and a computing system. results.title: APPARATUS FOR MULTIMODAL ANALYSIS OF ALLERGIC REACTIONS IN SKIN TESTS AND A HYBRID METHOD FOR MULTISPECTRAL IMAGING OF ALLERGIC REACTIONS IN SKIN TESTS AND ITS USE FOR AUTOMATIC EVALUATION OF THE RESULTS OF THESE TESTS
results.abstract: A multimodal apparatus for analysis of allergic reactions during skin tests and a method of multispectral imaging of allergic reactions in case of the type I and the type IV allergic reactions induced by performing skin allergy Prick and Patch tests combine thermal imaging with Laser Doppler flowmet

results.title: Folate targeted enhanced tumor and folate receptor positive tissue optical imaging technology
results.abstract: A method of differentiating tumors from healthy cells in tissue is disclosed. The method includes the steps of providing a marker-folate conjugate, placing the marker-folate conjugate in contact with the tissue and viewing the tissue.

results.title: SYSTEM, METHODS AND APPARATUSES FOR IN SITU ELECTROCHEMICAL IMAGING
results.abstract: Systems, methods and apparatuses described herein generally provide a millimetre size package-free complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor (“CMOS”) chip (referred to as a “die”) for the in situ (on-site) measurement or imaging of electrochemically detectable analytes.

results.title: TRANSCUTANEOUS ANALYTE SENSOR
results.abstract: Abstract of the Disclosure The present invention relates generally to systems and methods for measuring an analyte in a host. More particularly, the present invention relates to systems and methods for transcutaneous measurement of glucose in a host.
